name: Glam Glow Hydra Serum
description: A feather-light hydrating serum powered by triple hyaluronic acid and vitamin B5. Instantly quenches thirsty skin, leaving a dewy, plump finish that lasts all day.
usage: Dispense 2–3 drops onto clean fingertips and press gently into face and neck morning and evening, before moisturiser.

name: Rose Velvet Lip Treatment
description: An overnight lip mask infused with rosehip oil, shea butter, and ceramides. Repairs cracked, dry lips and restores a soft, pillowy texture by morning.
usage: Apply a generous layer before bed. Wake up to soft, smooth lips. Can also be used as a daytime balm.

name: Lumière Foundation SPF 30
description: A buildable, medium-to-full coverage foundation with SPF 30 protection. Features a skin-like satin finish and 24-hour wear formula suitable for all skin tones.
usage: Apply with a damp beauty sponge or foundation brush for buildable coverage. Blend outward from the centre of the face.

name: Vitamin C Brightening Toner
description: An alcohol-free brightening toner with 10% vitamin C, niacinamide, and alpha-arbutin. Visibly fades dark spots and uneven skin tone in 4 weeks.
usage: Apply to a cotton pad and sweep over cleansed face morning and evening. Follow with serum and moisturiser.

name: Midnight Repair Eye Cream
description: A rich eye cream with retinol, peptides, and caffeine. Targets dark circles, puffiness, and fine lines around the delicate eye area overnight.
usage: Using your ring finger, gently tap a pea-sized amount around the orbital bone. Use nightly.

name: Curl Defining Hair Mousse
description: A lightweight, alcohol-free mousse that defines natural curls and waves, reduces frizz, and adds flexible hold without crunchiness.
usage: Apply to damp hair from roots to ends, scrunch upward, and diffuse or air-dry.

name: Velvet Matte Lip Colour – Bordeaux
description: A long-wearing, transfer-proof liquid lipstick in a deep bordeaux shade. The creamy formula sets to a velvety matte finish and keeps lips hydrated.
usage: Line lips with a matching liner for precision. Apply from the centre outward. Allow 60 seconds to set.

name: Sunscreen Fluid SPF 50+ PA++++
description: An ultra-lightweight, invisible sunscreen fluid with SPF 50+ and PA++++ protection. No white cast; suitable for all skin tones and comfortable under makeup.
usage: Apply liberally to face and exposed skin 15 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply every 2 hours.

name: Argan Oil Hair Elixir
description: A luxurious blend of pure argan oil and silk proteins that tames frizz, adds mirror-like shine, and protects hair from heat damage up to 230°C.
usage: Apply 2–4 drops to damp or dry hair, focusing on mid-lengths and ends. Style as usual.

name: Hydra-Boost Gel Moisturiser
description: An oil-free, water-gel moisturiser that delivers 72-hour hydration. Perfect for oily and combination skin types seeking a lightweight, non-comedogenic formula.
usage: Apply morning and evening after serum. Use as the last step before sunscreen during the day.
